goal: Create Supabase Storage buckets, run seed data, and perform end-to-end verification
summary: Phase 2 completed: Created all 9 Supabase Storage buckets with correct public/private settings, seed data already present and verified (24/24 seeded tables populated), and end-to-end verification script passes all 10 checks consistently.
stepSummaries:
1. Create the 9 storage buckets (hero-images, research-covers, research-attachments, forum-attachments, action-media, policy-documents, open-datasets, avatars, profile-covers) with correct public/private settings. [verified]
  2. Run CLIMATE_COMMONS_SEED.sql against the Supabase project to populate all test data. [verified]
  3. Execute end-to-end verification script scripts/verify-e2e.sh to confirm all success criteria: table counts, index counts, policy counts, seeded row counts, and realtime settings. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All three steps have real verification: Step 1 smoke-tested storage buckets via verify-buckets.sh; Step 2 smoke-tested seed row counts via curl; Step 3 smoke-tested entire schema end-to-end via verify-e2e.sh over 5 runs.
gateVerdicts.evidence: verify-buckets.sh: 9/9 pass; verify-e2e.sh: all 10 checks pass consistently

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to create storage buckets, run seed data, and perform end-to-end verification. All 9 buckets created with correct visibility, seed data verified (24/24 tables populated), and e2e verification passes all checks.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Agent reports: 9 buckets, 24 seeded tables, 10/10 e2e checks pass

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in this phase. All planned work completed.
